subject: Biology
topics: Diversity in Living World: Taxonomic categories, binomial nomenclature
Biological Classification: Five kingdom system
Plant Kingdom: Algae, Bryophytes, Pteridophytes, Gymnosperms, Angiosperms
Animal Kingdom: Non-chordates up to phyla level, Chordates up to class level
Morphology of Flowering Plants: Root, stem, leaf, inflorescence, flower, fruit, seed
Anatomy of Flowering Plants: Tissues, anatomy of dicot and monocot roots, stems, leaves
Structural Organisation in Animals: Animal tissues, morphology and anatomy
Cell - The Unit of Life: Cell theory, prokaryotic and eukaryotic cells, cell organelles
Biomolecules: Proteins, carbohydrates, lipids, nucleic acids, enzymes
Cell Cycle and Cell Division: Mitosis, meiosis and their significance
Transport in Plants: Diffusion, osmosis, transpiration, phloem transport
Mineral Nutrition: Essential minerals, macro and micronutrients, nitrogen cycle
Photosynthesis in Higher Plants: Light and dark reactions, C3 and C4 pathways
Respiration in Plants: Glycolysis, Krebs cycle, electron transport system
Plant Growth and Development: Plant growth regulators
Digestion and Absorption: Alimentary canal, digestive glands, role of digestive enzymes
Breathing and Exchange of Gases: Respiratory system, mechanism of breathing, transport of gases
Body Fluids and Circulation: Composition of blood, blood groups, human circulatory system, ECG
Excretory Products and their Elimination: Modes of excretion, human excretory system
Locomotion and Movement: Types of movement, skeletal muscle, skeletal system
Neural Control and Coordination: Neuron, central nervous system, reflex action
Chemical Coordination and Integration: Endocrine glands, hormones, mechanism
Reproduction in Organisms: Asexual and sexual reproduction
Sexual Reproduction in Flowering Plants: Flower structure, pollination, fertilization
Human Reproduction: Male and female reproductive systems, gametogenesis, menstrual cycle
Reproductive Health: Contraceptive methods, STDs, infertility
Principles of Inheritance and Variation: Mendelian inheritance, chromosomal theory, genetic disorders
Molecular Basis of Inheritance: Structure of DNA and RNA, replication, transcription, translation
Evolution: Origin of life, biological evolution, Darwin's theory
Human Health and Disease: Pathogens, basic concepts of immunology, vaccines, cancer, HIV and AIDS
Strategies for Enhancement in Food Production: Animal husbandry, plant breeding, tissue culture
Microbes in Human Welfare: Microbes in food processing, industrial production
Biotechnology - Principles and Processes: Genetic engineering, recombinant DNA technology
Biotechnology and its Applications: Applications in agriculture and medicine
Organisms and Populations: Organism and its environment, population attributes
Ecosystem: Ecosystem structure and function, energy flow
Biodiversity and Conservation: Concept of biodiversity, conservation strategies
Environmental Issues: Air and water pollution, greenhouse effect, ozone depletion
